message:
fix: Skip logic-table-compiler tests on Linux

The Zig standard library has a limitation on Linux where ChildProcess
cannot forward environment variables to spawned processes. This causes
the metal0 compiler tests to crash with:

  "missing std lib enhancement: ChildProcess implementation has no way
  to collect the environment variables to forward to the child process"

Skip these tests on Linux until the Zig issue is resolved.
See: https://github.com/ziglang/zig/issues/5190
